items.title: Saudi Arabia helicopter crash kills all 14 on board as emergency crews descend
items.summary: The Saudi Ministry of Energy confirmed there were no survivors after an Aramco-owned helicopter crashed in Ras Tanura at approximately 6am local time on Sunday

items.title: Closebye – “No Troubles Left At All” & “Ann Arbor”
items.summary: In 2024, Closebye caught our attention with their self-released sophomore effort, Hammer Of My Own. The New York indie rockers are back today with their first new music since then, in the form of two tracks called "No Troubles Left At All" and "Ann Arbor." The post Closebye – “No Troubles Left At All” & “Ann Arbor” appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Andy Cohen Claims To Be A Deadhead But Only Just Found Out Phil Lesh Was On Real Housewives In 2008
items.summary: Andy Cohen is famously a Deadhead — so much so that Dead & Company's John Mayer once had to clarify that they were not in a romantic relationship — yet somehow he was unaware that a founding member of the beloved band once made a cameo on The Real Housewives Of New York City. It was none other than bassist Phil Lesh, who passed away in 2024.
